= Player Character =

{{CharacterInfobox
| name        = Player Character
| portrait    = https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/default-icons/mystery-man.svg
| level       = 1
| size        = Medium
| hp          = 8/8
| ac          = 14
| perception  = +5
| speed       = 25 ft.
| fortitude   = +5
| reflex      = +6
| will        = +3
| attributes  = '''STR''' +0 | '''DEX''' +1 | '''CON''' +0 | '''INT''' +0 | '''WIS''' +0 | '''CHA''' +0
| key_ability  = STR
| hero_points  = 1
}}

== Details ==
* '''Class:''' <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/classes/gunslinger.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Gunslinger" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> Gunslinger
* '''Key Ability:''' STR
* '''Hero Points:''' 1

<div class="toccolours mw-collapsible mw-collapsed">
<b>⚔ Defense & Saves</b>
<div class="mw-collapsible-content">
* '''HP:''' 8/8
* '''AC:''' 14
* '''Perception:''' +5 ({{color|#4682b4|'''Expert'''}})
* '''Speed:''' 25 ft. (land)
* '''Fortitude:''' +5 ({{color|#4682b4|'''Expert'''}})
* '''Reflex:''' +6 ({{color|#4682b4|'''Expert'''}})
* '''Will:''' +3 ({{color|#2e8b57|'''Trained'''}})
</div>
</div>

<div class="toccolours mw-collapsible mw-collapsed">
<b>📊 Ability Scores</b>
<div class="mw-collapsible-content">
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center; width:100%;"
|-
! STR !! DEX !! CON !! INT !! WIS !! CHA
|-
| +0 || +1 || +0 || +0 || +0 || +0
|}
</div>
</div>

<div class="toccolours mw-collapsible mw-collapsed">
<b>🎓 Skills</b>
<div class="mw-collapsible-content">
{| class="wikitable sortable" style="width:100%;"
! Skill !! Modifier !! Proficiency
|-
| Acrobatics || +1 || {{color|#708090|'''Untrained'''}}
|-
| Arcana || +0 || {{color|#708090|'''Untrained'''}}
|-
| Athletics || +0 || {{color|#708090|'''Untrained'''}}
|-
| Crafting || +0 || {{color|#708090|'''Untrained'''}}
|-
| Deception || +0 || {{color|#708090|'''Untrained'''}}
|-
| Diplomacy || +0 || {{color|#708090|'''Untrained'''}}
|-
| Intimidation || +0 || {{color|#708090|'''Untrained'''}}
|-
| Medicine || +0 || {{color|#708090|'''Untrained'''}}
|-
| Nature || +0 || {{color|#708090|'''Untrained'''}}
|-
| Occultism || +0 || {{color|#708090|'''Untrained'''}}
|-
| Performance || +0 || {{color|#708090|'''Untrained'''}}
|-
| Religion || +0 || {{color|#708090|'''Untrained'''}}
|-
| Society || +0 || {{color|#708090|'''Untrained'''}}
|-
| Stealth || +1 || {{color|#708090|'''Untrained'''}}
|-
| Survival || +0 || {{color|#708090|'''Untrained'''}}
|-
| Thievery || +1 || {{color|#708090|'''Untrained'''}}
|}
</div>
</div>

<div class="toccolours mw-collapsible mw-collapsed">
<b>💰 Wealth & Carry</b>
<div class="mw-collapsible-content">
{| class="wikitable"
! Coin !! Total Value !! Bulk !! Invested
|-
| None || 0 gp || 1.0 / 5 enc / 10 max || 0/10
|}
</div>
</div>

<div class="toccolours mw-collapsible mw-collapsed">
<b>✨ Feats & Features</b>
<div class="mw-collapsible-content">
=====Feats=====
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/magic/symbols/question-stone-yellow.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Gunslinger's Way" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Gunslinger's Way''' <small>(gunslinger)</small>
: All gunslingers have a particular way they follow, a combination of philosophy and combat style that defines both how they fight and the weapons they excel with. At 1st level, your way grants you an initial deed, a unique reload action called a slinger's reload, and proficiency with a particular skill. You also gain advanced and greater deeds at later levels, as well as access to way-specific feats.

'''Way of the Drifter''' You wander across the battlefield, equally at home in and out of the fray.

'''Way of the Pistolero''' You carefully maintain your distance at a duelist's 10 paces with pistol in hand.

'''Way of the Sniper''' You practice a methodical style of shooting, striking from far cover.

'''Way of the Vanguard''' You rely on a brutal combat style that uses heavy weapons and explosive attacks.

'''Way of the Triggerbrand''' You prefer firearms that work well as weapons in both melee and ranged combat
; <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/icons/skills/targeting/crosshair-bars-yellow.webp" width="20" height="20" alt="Slinger's Precision" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> '''Slinger's Precision''' <small>(gunslinger)</small>
: You deal an extra +2 precision damage with Strikes made using non-repeating crossbows and you deal an extra 1d4 precision damage on Strikes using non-repeating firearms.

If you have gunslinging legend, you instead deal +3 additional precision damage with Strikes using non-repeating crossbows and an additional 1d6 precision damage with Strikes using non-repeating firearms.

If you are using a combination weapon whose ranged form is a firearm or crossbow, you use your proficiency with firearms and crossbows for attacks made with the melee configuration of that weapon.

</div>
</div>

<div class="toccolours mw-collapsible mw-collapsed">
<b>🎒 Inventory</b>
<div class="mw-collapsible-content">
=====Weapons=====
{| class="wikitable" style="width:100%;"
! !! Item !! Qty !! Bulk !! Level !! Price
|-
| <html><img src="https://foundry.atkennedy.com/systems/pf2e/icons/equipment/weapons/mithral-tree.webp" width="24" height="24" alt="Dawnsilver Tree" style="vertical-align:middle;" /></html> || [[Dawnsilver Tree]] || 1 || 1 || 0 || 7 gp
|}

</div>
</div>

''Last synced: 2026-06-20 01:33''
[[Category:Characters]]
